subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest forth the praise and glorification of the Lord! Be thou in this presence as Ahmad, that is, engaged in praise of the Most Great [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بحمد و ستایش پروردگار در این محضر احمد باش یعنی بستایش جلیل اکبر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
